assertions.description: Relative color syntax (rgb(from <color> r g b)) is supported.
assertions.test: color: rgb(from red r g b)

assertions.description: The alpha keyword can be used (and computed on) in the alpha channel slot of a relative color.
assertions.test: color: rgb(from #0022ff r g b / calc(alpha * 0.4))

assertions.description: Relative alpha math also works inside hsl().
assertions.test: color: hsl(from red h s l / calc(alpha / 2))
